mapper.sql: id,complaint_source,task_source, task_sys,complaint_task,complaint_form, complaint_type,reason,form_dept, status,reply,is_deleted, create_by,create_time,update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select ocr.id, ocr.complaint_source, ocr.task_source, ocr.task_sys, yt.task_name as complaintTask, bf.table_name as complaintForm, bf.table_label as complaintFormName, ocr.complaint_type, ocr.reason, od.dept_name as formDept, odd.dept_name as parFormDept, ocr.status, ocr.reply, ocr.create_time from org_complaint_report ocr left join yj_task yt on (yt.id = ocr.complaint_task and yt.is_deleted = 0) left join bbt_form_table bf on (bf.id = ocr.complaint_form and bf.is_deleted = 0) left join org_department od on (od.dept_code = ocr.form_dept and od.is_deleted = 0) left join org_department odd on (odd.id = od.parent_id and odd.is_deleted = 0) where ocr.is_deleted = 0
and ocr.id in
#{id}
order by ocr.create_time desc
select table_label from bbt_form_table where id = #{id}
select task_name from yj_task where id = #{id}
select realname from org_user where id = #{id}
